title: Added the Activity Logs section
reason: Give the team one place to see both in-app value changes (the audit trail) and the code/feature changes we make, each with the reasoning. In-app changes read spine.activity_log; feature changes read this curated changelog.
author: Claude + Nassim

title: Removed Training Tracker and Trainer Workload from the hub
reason: The training team is building their own portal for those apps. Removed them from the shell directory; their folders and Laravel endpoints remain dormant for easy reversal.
author: Claude + Nassim

title: Added the Build Score tab
reason: Bring back the per-account Build Score view from the old accounts page: a client 1-10 self-score plus a LAVA score derived from the 15 standard automation pipelines.
author: Claude + Nassim

title: Rebuilt the Portal as a thin shell directory
reason: Client Profile is now the main accounts navigation. Stripped the Portal's own Accounts/Dashboard/VA Overview and the dead Tools/Team placeholders down to a clean launcher for the real apps.
author: Claude + Nassim

title: Aligned all in-repo docs and comments to the Laravel-API architecture
reason: CLAUDE.md and REVIEW.md still described the superseded browser-to-Supabase design. Brought every self-description in line with React to Laravel /api to Postgres, and dropped the dead supabase prop.
author: Claude + Nassim

title: Shared option_set pool + edit-anywhere universal account fields
reason: One source of truth for standard company fields so a change in any app reflects everywhere. Added the option_set dropdown pool and the universal account endpoint; QAQC now reads CRM from the account.
author: Claude + Nassim
